compiled_state.title: [scan-docs.sh]: agent placed in skills/onboarding/ -> should be in scripts/ per project convention
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During epic 1a6f-086b implementation, the agent created scan-docs.sh at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh rather than plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh as specified in the story description.

## Expected Behavior
Reusable scripts should live in plugins/dso/scripts/. The story spec said "Extend plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh".

## Actual Behavior
File is at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh. Tests were written against this path so everything passes, but it violates the scripts/ convention.

## Fix
Move to plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh. Update SKILL.md Phase 0.5 invocation path and test references.

comments.body: Duplicate of 05d5-9838. Both describe the same issue: scan-docs.sh placed at skills/onboarding/ instead of scripts/. Closing as duplicate; will fix via 05d5-9838.
comments.author: Test
